qa_pair.question: Which tool is used to convert files from one format to another?
Which engine converter handles PDF text extraction?
Which engine converter handles docx and markup file conversions?
Which tool is called to see the registry list of all supported conversion pairs?
Which tool would you call to preview only the first few characters of a converted document?
How many source arguments can be provided to filebridge_convert_file simultaneously (path and base64)?
Is a directory traversal attempt outside FILES_DIR blocked by the file bridge server?
What Python package is used under the hood by the pymupdf converter to parse PDFs?
What is the default max characters previewed by the filebridge_preview_output tool?
Can a private conversion engine be registered without changing the MCP tool surface?
